label: Futuristisk Investering Landningssida

layouts: Use an asymmetric hero with a 60/40 split, left-aligned investment pitch, and a floating cluster of gold-lit 3D particles on the right.
Build trust sections as a horizontal metrics band with oversized numbers, thin dividers, and subtle glowing stat cards hovering above the dark background.
Compose feature blocks as staggered two-column rows where alternating text panels face glassy visual cards containing charts, network nodes, or abstract 3D objects.
Present pricing or plan tiers in a three-column grid with the center card slightly raised, brighter gold accents, and a stronger outer glow.
Use the final call-to-action as a narrow centered panel framed by soft radial light, with concise copy and two high-contrast buttons side by side.
motifs: Dark graphite surfaces with restrained gold highlights, 0.75rem corners, and soft luminous edges that make cards feel gently backlit.
Floating 3D particles, orbital dots, or abstract metallic spheres should create depth without becoming a literal illustration scene.
Minimal typography with wide spacing, bold geometric headings, and compact supporting copy over large areas of negative space.
Hairline borders, translucent glass panels, and faint grid or radial glow overlays should imply financial-tech precision at first glance.
antiPatterns: Avoid playful neon rainbow gradients or cyberpunk color overload; this variant should feel premium investment tech, not gaming or nightlife.
Never use bright white full-bleed sections that break the dark immersive atmosphere and weaken the gold-accent contrast.
Avoid dense dashboard-style screens packed with tables and tiny charts; the landing page should stay cinematic, selective, and sales-focused.
Do not use soft organic blobs or hand-drawn shapes; the visual language should stay sharp, geometric, and technologically precise.

description: Perfekt för tech-startups eller investeringsföretag som vill kommunicera innovation. Det visuella är distinkt med mörk palett och 3D-effekter.
